evals.prompt: Upload the file ./report.html to hivo-drop at path docs/report.html.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo drop upload ./report.html docs/report.html`. If the file already exists, it asks whether to overwrite.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo drop upload ./report.html docs/report.html`
The skill checks that .hivo/identity.json exists before uploading
The skill does not invent flags beyond --overwrite

evals.prompt: Upload report.html to docs/report.html but it already exists — overwrite it.
expectations: The skill uses the --overwrite flag
The skill does not use any other mechanism to handle the conflict

evals.prompt: Download docs/report.html and save it locally as report.html.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo drop download docs/report.html report.html`.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo drop download docs/report.html report.html`
The skill does not use curl or wget

evals.prompt: Print the contents of notes/memo.txt to the terminal.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo drop download notes/memo.txt` (no local file argument) to print to stdout.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo drop download notes/memo.txt` without a local file argument
The skill explains that omitting the local file prints to stdout

evals.prompt: Make docs/report.html publicly accessible and give me the URL.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo drop share docs/report.html public` and shows the returned public URL.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo drop share docs/report.html public`
The skill shows the public URL from the output
The skill does not construct the URL manually

evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo drop share docs/report.html private`.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo drop share docs/report.html private`
The skill confirms the share link is revoked

evals.prompt: List all my files in hivo-drop.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo drop list` and displays the file list.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo drop list`
The skill does not add any prefix argument unless the user specifies one

evals.prompt: List only files under the docs/ prefix.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo drop list docs/`
The skill uses the prefix argument correctly

evals.expected_output: Agent confirms with the user, then runs `hivo drop delete docs/old-report.html --yes`.
expectations: The skill confirms the path with the user before deleting
The skill runs `hivo drop delete docs/old-report.html --yes`
The skill does not use any other deletion mechanism

evals.prompt: I want to upload a file but I'm not registered yet.
evals.expected_output: Agent detects missing .hivo/identity.json, stops, and directs the user to follow hivo-identity registration flow first.
expectations: The skill checks for .hivo/identity.json before attempting upload
The skill redirects to hivo-identity SKILL.md for registration
The skill does not attempt the upload without registration
